tasks.title: Replace activityFilters array with activityType string state
tasks.notes: Removed ACTIVITY_FILTER_DEFS constant. Replaced activityFilters useState([]) with activityType useState(''). Updated filter pipeline: chip OR-logic replaced with prefix match. Updated hasActiveFilters and useMemo deps.

tasks.title: Redesign Activity toolbar to Entries pattern
tasks.notes: Entry count left, Refresh right, border-b. Matches BudgetEntries toolbar pattern.

tasks.title: Replace chips + advanced panel with inline filter rows
tasks.notes: Primary row: Search (icon-in-input), Type, Action, User, Sort, More/Fewer, Clear. Secondary row (expandable): From, To, Year, Month, CF Cat, Direction, Min, Max, Scenario. All controls use CONTROL_PADDED text-xs with inline label pattern.

tasks.title: Update tests for activityType
tasks.notes: Replaced activityFilters array param with activityType string. Updated chip tests to type filter tests. Added cashflow and element type tests per reviewer feedback.

tasks.title: Review changes
tasks.notes: 1 warning (Clear handler missing setActivityShowAdvanced(false)) — fixed. 1 suggestion (add cashflow/element type tests) — added.

tasks.title: Fix reviewer findings
tasks.notes: Added setActivityShowAdvanced(false) to Clear handler. Added 2 new type filter tests (cashflow, element).

tasks.title: Run full test suite and verify build
tasks.notes: npm test: 48 server + 34 client = 82 tests, all pass. Build succeeds (788.99 kB, slightly smaller than before).

tasks.title: Update handoff documentation
tasks.notes: Updated all agent handoff files and HANDOFF.md.
